gift_format.detail: All 6 questions are valid GIFT MCQs: exactly one = (correct) and three ~ (distractor) lines each. No syntax errors. $CATEGORY header present.

meta_gift_desync.detail: Correct positions re-derived from .gift: [2,0,3,1,2,3]. Matches sidecar correct_position_distribution exactly.

positional_bias.detail: No position exceeds 40% of questions. Distribution is acceptably spread across all four positions.

length_bias.detail: Only q1 has the correct answer longer than 120% of the mean distractor length (30 chars vs mean distractor 22.0, threshold 26.4). Rate 1/6 = 0.167 is well below 0.40.

distractor_plausibility.detail: No score-1 (obviously absurd) distractors found. All distractors represent plausible beginner misconceptions grounded in the corpus content.

objective_coverage.detail: All 5 LOs from corpus §3 are covered. q6 objective_ref 'Draw/describe a flowchart for a short real-world process' fuzzy-matches corpus LO3 'Draw a flowchart for a short, real-world process' at ≥0.9 similarity.

beginner_fairness_and_scope.detail: All stems use plain language defined within this topic's corpus. Every question tests only concepts taught in topic 1.8. Distractors reflect beginner misconceptions plausible to a student who read only this topic.

verdict: Pass — all checks clean: no positional bias (max_share 0.33), no length bias (rate 0.17), zero absurd distractors, all 5 LOs covered, valid GIFT syntax, on-scope and beginner-fair.
